title: Obsession
tmdbOverview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.
synopsis: Released in 2026, Obsession is a horror and thriller film from United States and United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
